commands_run.command: scripts/run_scenario.py smoke with ExpenseLiteBenchDemo and ExpenseLiteBenchOracles
commands_run.notes: Seed B001 slash-date failure reproduced; B001 finalize, trusted evidence, B002 activation, aggregation, no-board boundary, and seed validation passed.

decisions: P008 is left READY_FOR_REVIEW instead of DONE because final independent rereview could not run after subagent usage limits were reached.
Runner lifecycle is the trusted path; standalone activation and finalize scripts now recover signed runner state instead of directly mutating lifecycle authority.
Workspace `.board/run.yaml` and evidence remain readable mirrors; signed external results are authoritative.
Reviewer adapters are operator-trusted commands and cannot mutate trusted control-plane files without detection.
Policy files `search_rules.json` and `smell_rules.json` are tracked at full-BoardFlow baseline so strategy changes are scored.
next_recommended_step: Run two independent read-only rereviews when subagent quota is available, then mark P008 and M2 DONE if no blocking findings remain.
risks: Final independent rereview is pending because two reviewer agents errored with the Codex usage-limit message.
HMAC and digest checks do not replace an OS sandbox for hostile agent or reviewer processes.
Adapter timeout remains a follow-up hardening item.

tests.name: Full pytest suite
tests.notes: 111 passed, including mutation tests for signed manifests, trusted evidence, reviewer mutations, aggregation bindings, handoff semantics, policy-file scope, command placeholders, and oracle pinning.

tests.name: Real Expense Lite smoke
tests.notes: Ran against local sibling demo and oracle repositories with fixed seed and oracle commits.
